article_title: Bylaw 14752 — Housing Agreement (4990 Bennett Street) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In Non-Market Rental Units at 4990 Bennett Street via Housing Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14752 on July 8, 2025, authorising a legally binding housing agreement with LM Riviera Homes Ltd. requiring non-market rental units in the 6-storey rental podium of the Bennett Street development.
briefs.action_required: Review the Housing Agreement terms and ensure non-market unit obligations are reflected in your development and tenancy management plans.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14752 — Housing Agreement (4990 Bennett Street) Bylaw 2025
